calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-22-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for Court Trial/Short Cause. No appearance by Defendant(s)
Dept. 514, Judge: Lynn O'Malley Taylor, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.

Arnold W. Evje, II, Esq., for the Plaintiff N.R. PATEL
N. R. Patel sworn and examined of behalf of the Plaintiff.
No appearance by Defendant(s) ANDRE SMITH, MYISHA MCNAIRY.
After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against defendant as follows:
The Rental Agreement is canceled.
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 106 Sixth Street, #506, San Francisco, CA 94103.

Damages $675.00
Holdover damages $2,925.00
Pre-judgment interest $0.00
Attorney's Fees $0.00
Costs $240.00
for a Total Judgment of $3,840.00
Other: Defendants named in item 3a above must pay Plaintiff $75.00 per day for each day that they remain in the premises stated in item 4 above after the date of entry of Judgment.
Judgment signed in open court.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Jun-22-2015 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-17-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Line 14
Judge Pro Tem: Barbara Anscher, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501/JPT)
Appearances:
Plaintiff NR Patel is present.
Attorney Arnold Evje for the plaintiff.
Defendants Andre Smith and Myisha McNairy are NOT present.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there was no appearance by defendants. The trial date of June 22, 2015 remains on calendar. (501/jpt)
